description_long: This object is a modern chainsaw with a predominantly orange and black color scheme, featuring a long, toothed cutting bar and a robust body. The main housing is orange with black accents and includes a cylindrical motor casing with visible bolts and a prominent circular detail. The cutting chain wraps around the bar, with sharp, evenly spaced teeth designed for efficient wood cutting. The handle is ergonomically shaped, black, and curves backward, providing a secure grip and control, with a visible trigger area and a metallic spring or cable detail. There is a small, round emblem or logo on the side of the housing, and the bar is marked with text, suggesting branding or safety information. The overall design is sleek and functional, with visible safety features and a sturdy build suitable for urban maintenance or landscaping tasks.
description: A modern orange and black chainsaw with a long toothed bar, ergonomic handle, and visible branding, designed for efficient cutting and urban utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the chainsaw, with the cylindrical motor housing and the tip of the cutting bar visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the cutting bar, the orange and black housing, ergonomic handle, and visible logo and text details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the handle's curvature, the back of the motor housing, and the alignment of the cutting bar and chain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the bar, handle, and housing, with less visible text but clear structural details.
attribute_brand_logo: A round emblem with a white graphic and text is visible on the side of the housing, likely representing the brand logo.
attribute_handle_design: Single main handle with a curved, ergonomic design, positioned at the rear and top, featuring a trigger area and possible anti-vibration features.
